name: get_zone_day_report
description: Retrieve detailed daily report for a specific zone on a given date, including hourly temperature data, heating/cooling activity, occupancy patterns, energy consumption analytics, weather conditions, and other zone-specific energy insights for that day

date.description: The date for which to retrieve the day report in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2026-03-06')

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home/account

zone_id.description: The unique identifier of the zone (room)
